decision_framework.KEEP: Still finance-relevant enough to keep indexed
decision_framework.REVIEW_LATER: Weak content — improve when resources allow
decision_framework.LOW_PRIORITY: Don't optimize for CTR — not worth the effort

decisions.note: Auto-generated macroeconomic news. Has impressions but weak brand fit. Keep indexed (not harmful enough to noindex), but do NOT optimize for CTR.
